case_title: CBSJ FINANCIAL CORPORATION VS. OSCAR A PAZ et al

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CBSJ FINANCIAL CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT PAZ, OSCAR A DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JAN-24-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-19-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JAN-09-2003

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-05-2003 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JAN-24-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ALSO BY MAIL ON JANUARY 12, 2003; AFFIDAVIT OF REASONABLE DILIGENCE ATTACHED FILED BY PLAINTIFF CBSJ FINANCIAL CORPORATION SERVED JAN-12-2003, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PAZ, OSCAR A

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-05-2003 CONTINUED TO APR-16-2003 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). MAR-05-2003 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-16-2003 CONTINUED TO MAY-21-2003 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). APR-16-2003 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF CBSJ FINANCIAL CORPORATION
ORIGINAL SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF CBSJ FINANCIAL CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT PAZ, OSCAR A
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $179.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT PAZ, OSCAR A

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CBSJ FINANCIAL CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PAZ, OSCAR A $6,691.54 PRINCIPAL, $660.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,648.13 INTEREST, $179.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,178.67, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAY-21-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
